semanticVisualQuery: Identifying Acids and Bases Litmus Litmus pap...

assetDebugEntries.resolvedAltText: pH test strips, also known as pH indicator strips or pH litmus strips, are simple and convenient tools used to measure the pH of a solution. pH is a measure of the acidity or alkalinity of a solution and is represented on a scale ranging from 0 to 14. A pH of 7 is considered neutral, values below 7 are acidic, and values above 7 are alkaline (basic).
